title: tournesol gracilis
intro: Tournesol gracilis, also known as sensitive plant, is a type of flowering plant native to South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tournesol gracilis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Tournesol gracilis plant are often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
